name: abrdn Palladium ETF Trust
summary: PART I The purpose of the abrdn Palladium ETF Trust (the Trust) is to own palladium transferred to the Trust in exchange for shares issued by the Trust (Shares). Each Share represents a fractional undivided beneficial interest in and ownership of the Trust. The assets of the Trust consist solely of palladium bullion. The Trust was formed on December 30, 2009 when an initial deposit of palladium was made in exchange for the issuance of two Baskets (at the time of the initial deposit, a Basket con...
